method.classification: Rust paths use the checked-in ast-grep cfg(test) item/reference classifier and tokei production-code count; production files with removed test ranges are mixed, zero-production files are test-only, and the sole non-Rust golden under testdata is test-only
method.inventory_encoding: exact stdout bytes, UTF-8 paths separated and terminated by NUL; decode errors fail generation
method.inventory_hash: SHA-256 over exact command stdout including trailing NUL
